chapter_title.ar: باب كَرَاهِيَةِ تَزْوِيجِ الْحَمْقَاءِ وَ الْمَجْنُونَةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 29 – Abhorren of marrying the stupid and the insane woman

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/58)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/58)
text: سَأَلَهُ بَعْضُ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنِ الرَّجُلِ الْمُسْلِمِ تُعْجِبُهُ الْمَرْأَةُ الْحَسْنَاءُ أَ يَصْلُحُ لَهُ أَنْ يَتَزَوَّجَهَا وَ هِيَ مَجْنُونَةٌ قَالَ لَا وَ لَكِنْ إِنْ كَانَتْ عِنْدَهُ أَمَةٌ مَجْنُونَةٌ فَلَا بَأْسَ بِأَنْ يَطَأَهَا وَ لَا يَطْلُبَ وَلَدَهَا .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Mahboub, from Abu Ayoub Al Khazaz, from Muhammad Bin Muslim,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘One of our companions asked him<sup>asws</sup> about the Muslim man fascinated by the beauty of the woman, is it correct for him that he marries her and she is insane?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said; ‘No, but if there was an insane slave girl with him, so there is no problem if he copulates with her, but he should not seek her children’.
en.sarwar: 3. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn Mahbub abu Ayyub al-Khazzaz from Muhammad ibn Muslim who has said the following: “Certain persons of our people once asked abu Ja’far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of a Muslim man who likes a beautiful woman; if he can marry her and she is insane. He (the Imam) said, ’No, however, if he has an insane slave-girl he can go to bed with her but must not seek her children (he must use contraceptives).”’
